description_long: This helmet features a robust, angular shell with a matte orange finish and a prominent white vertical stripe running down the center. The front is equipped with a black, reinforced faceplate that includes mechanical and electronic components, suggesting advanced functionality or protection. On the sides, there are visible metallic attachments and a circular device, possibly for communication or sensory enhancement. The rear of the helmet is mostly black with yellow wiring details and a panel-like structure, adding to its high-tech appearance. The neck area is protected by a thick, dark brown fabric scarf and black, padded shoulder guards, providing additional coverage and comfort. The surface shows signs of wear, with scratches and scuffs, indicating use in rugged urban environments.
description: A high-tech, orange helmet with a white stripe, black reinforced faceplate, and mechanical side attachments, paired with a brown scarf and black shoulder guards. The helmet shows wear and features detailed wiring and paneling on the back.
description_view_0: Front view shows the orange helmet with a white central stripe, black faceplate, and visible mechanical details around the jaw and sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the metallic side attachment, circular device, and the textured brown scarf wrapping the neck.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the black back panel with yellow wiring, attachment points, and the full width of the scarf and shoulder guards.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the helmet's orange shell, metallic components, and the scarf's drape over the shoulder.
attribute_graphic_design: Matte orange with a single white vertical stripe; minor black and yellow wiring details on the back; no additional graphics or motifs.
